creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
I still don't have a clear understanding of what the problem is.  I just re-tested the build with the OPENBLAS knob and had no problems.

http://pkg.ftfl.ca/data/13amd64-default/2021-10-19_14h32m08s/logs/R-4.1.1_2.log

For run-time issues, I normally use the default included RBLAS, so I may be missing something, but I also don't see any problems.
